build.beforeBuildCommand: cd ../agent && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run build && cd ../shell && pnpm build

bundle.shortDescription: AI Avatar Desktop — Chat with Naia
bundle.longDescription: Naia Shell is a desktop AI companion powered by LLM providers. Features an interactive VRM avatar (Naia), tool execution, and always-on daemon.
